title: Line Object Layout
description:
Line Object Layout

Line Object Layout

The Line object layout appears just as you would expect it to.  It's just a line with a starting point, an ending point, and an object name.  To reposition the Line object, simply click the name of the Line object and then drag the line to a new position.  To resize a Line object, click either the starting or ending point of the line and then drag it to a new position.

Line Object Layout
